name: Grilled Tuna Pasta Toss

ingredients.item: fresh spinach (about 3 handfuls of fresh spinach)

method: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
Season tuna steak with 1/2 tsp. basil and 1/2 tsp. seasoning salt. Grill or broil, being careful not to overcook. After
cooking, cool, then flake into small pieces; set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil and sauté garlic with remaining 1/2 tsp. seasoning salt. When garlic just starts to
brown, add onion, remaining 1/2 tsp. basil, spinach and sun-dried tomatoes (if using).
Continue cooking until onion and spinach are done, 3 to 5 minutes on medium-high heat.
Lower heat; add cooked and drained pasta, tuna and capers; toss well.
